note: Curve LlamaLend Controller — NEWER-gen impl (31 fns), 2 mainnet markets: sreUSD / sfrxUSD collateral (all borrow crvUSD), the 2 highest-TVL LlamaLend markets. Adds approve(address,bool) operator-delegation (COVERED as permission/protocol_authorization) + create_loan/remove_collateral/borrow_more +receiver overloads (excluded — base action covered). 9 cover (8 base + approve) · 22 exclude (1 keeper, 3 +receiver, 9 callback-extended, 3 liquidate, 5 admin, 1 set_extra_health).

0x23cfed03.name: create_loan(uint256,uint256,uint256)
0x23cfed03.reason: user create_loan on Curve LlamaLend Controller (lending) — venue=llama_lend{controller,collateral}; create_loan/borrow_more → Borrow (debt=crvUSD), add/remove_collateral → Supply/Withdraw (asset=collateral), repay → Repay. on_behalf_of = _for arg if present else tx.from.

0x3d140d21.name: approve(address,bool)
0x3d140d21.reason: PERMISSION DELEGATION — approve(_spender, _allow) authorizes another address to manage the caller's LlamaLend loan (operator). Decoded as permission/protocol_authorization{operator, authorized=_spender, is_authorized=_allow}. This is exactly ScopeBall's pre-sign permission surface; NOT silently dropped.
